title.name: Business, Selling, Trading and Collection Practices

sections.heading: Secs. 42-158b and 42-158c. Required calculation of lease rate. Required disclosures in lease agreements.

body: Sections 42-158b and 42-158c are repealed, effective July 1, 2002.
content.plainText: Sections 42-158b and 42-158c are repealed, effective July 1, 2002.

sections.heading: Secs. 42-158d to 42-158g. Unfair trade practice. Conflict with state or federal law to be avoided. Terms excluding or modifying implied warranties or remedies for breach unenforceable. Required disclosures.

body: Sections 42-158d to 42-158g , inclusive, are repealed, effective July 1, 2003.
content.plainText: Sections 42-158d to 42-158g , inclusive, are repealed, effective July 1, 2003.
